query:
SELECT a.id, a.name, a.consultorId, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointment_participants ap 
   JOIN mentor_appointments ma ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id 
   WHERE ap.alunoId = a.id AND ma.status != 'cancelado') as agendamentos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mentoring_sessions ms WHERE ms.alunoId = a.id AND ms.presence = 'presente') as sessoes_presente,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assessment_pdi apdi WHERE apdi.alunoId = a.id) as assessments
FROM alunos a 
WHERE a.consultorId IS NOT NULL 
HAVING agendamentos > 0
LIMIT 10
